weeks.label: January Week 1
weeks.ideasEvents:
-Where do we see items that are cold? Where do I go when it’s cold?

weeks.label: January Week 2
weeks.ideasEvents:
-Igloos and icebergs
-Artic habitats
-Polar animals: penguins, seals, whales
Vocabulary: Frigid, Research, penguins, hemisphere

weeks.label: January Week 3
weeks.ideasEvents:
-Construction workers and tools
-Building with blocks, boxes, and recyclables
-Blueprints and planning
-Towers, bridges, tubes, tunnels structures
-Teamwork and cooperation

weeks.ideasEvents:
-Construction workers and tools
-Building with blocks, boxes, and recyclables

weeks.ideasEvents:

weeks.label: February Week 1
weeks.ideasEvents:
-Exercise and movement

weeks.label: February Week 2
weeks.ideasEvents:

weeks.label: February Week 3
weeks.ideasEvents:
-Discuss many different genres of music (jazz, country, classical)
-Discuss different composers (ex: Beethoven, Mozart_
-Discuss rhythm and different instruments (string, woodwind)
Vocabulary: rhythm, tuning, instruments, composer, tempo, melody

weeks.label: February Week 4
weeks.ideasEvents:
-Flags and countries

weeks.ideasEvents:

-Book covers and titles

weeks.label: March Week 2
weeks.ideasEvents:

weeks.label: March Week 3
weeks.ideasEvents:

-Puddles, raindrops, and reflections
-mud play
-Sunshine and shadows
-The water cycle (rain to puddle to sky)
-Outdoor play and exploration
Vocabulary: Mud, rainbow, clay, soil, shadow, evaporate, condensation, water cycle

weeks.label: March Week 4
weeks.ideasEvents: Please remember to submit a full week’s worth of activities (5 small group and 5 large group) at least 3 weeks in advance so the ES has time to review, provide feedback if needed & purchase any necessary supplies.

weeks.label: March Week 5
weeks.ideasEvents:
-Flowers and blooming trees

weeks.label: April Week 2
weeks.ideasEvents:
-Celebrating each child’s individuality

Seeds, soil, and sunlight

weeks.label: July Week 2

weeks.ideasEvents:

weeks.label: July Week 4
weeks.ideasEvents: Please remember to submit a full week’s worth of activities (5 small group and 5 large group) at least 3 weeks in advance so the ES has time to review, provide feedback if needed & purchase any necessary supplies.

weeks.ideasEvents:
-Camping tents and pretend fire

weeks.label: August Week 2
weeks.ideasEvents:
-What animals live in the forest
-What do we find in the forest

Vocabulary: forest, den, tree hollow, cave, expedition, Hibernation

weeks.label: August Week 3
weeks.ideasEvents:
-Dinosaurs: names and types
-What do dinosaurs eat?
-Excavation sensory bins
-Comparing big vs. small

weeks.label: August Week 4

weeks.label: August Week 5
weeks.ideasEvents:
-Police, firefighters, and doctors

weeks.label: September Week 1
weeks.ideasEvents:
-My name and birthday
-Who lives at my house

weeks.label: September Week 2
weeks.ideasEvents:

weeks.label: September Week 3
weeks.ideasEvents:

specialEvents: December 24th – January 1st Closed for Winter Break
